languages.text: {n}Тервантьяс недовольно шипит, сжимая и разжимая когтистые руки.{/n} "Я не совсем понимаю, с каких пор ты возомнил{mf||а}, что обладаешь правом голоса, но твоя дерзость забавна. А вот его речи — нет. Эта беседа становится скучной".

{n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."
languages.original_text: {n}Тервантьяс недовольно шипит, сжимая и разжимая когтистые руки.{/n} "Я не совсем понимаю, с каких пор ты возомнил{mf||а}, что обладаешь правом голоса, но твоя дерзость забавна. А вот его речи — нет. Эта беседа становится скучной".

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, his clawed hands clench and unclench.{/n} "I am not entirely sure when you first imagined you had a voice in this, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

{n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, his clawed hands clench and unclench.{/n} "I am not entirely sure when you first imagined you had a voice in this, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

{n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

{n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias zischt verärgert und ballt seine Klauenhände zu Fäusten.{/n} "Ich bin mir nicht sicher, wie Ihr darauf kommt, dass Ihr Eure Stimme erheben dürft, aber Eure Frechheit ist amüsant. Seine Worte allerdings nicht. Diese Unterhaltung wird langsam lästig."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias zischt verärgert und ballt seine Klauenhände zu Fäusten.{/n} "Ich bin mir nicht sicher, wie Ihr darauf kommt, dass Ihr Eure Stimme erheben dürft, aber Eure Frechheit ist amüsant. Seine Worte allerdings nicht. Diese Unterhaltung wird langsam lästig."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias laisse échapper un sifflement agacé, tout en ouvrant et en refermant ses poings griffus.{/n} « Je ne sais pas exactement ce qui vous a poussé à imaginer que vous aviez voix au chapitre, mais votre insolence est fort amusante. Ses paroles, en revanche, ne le sont pas. Cette conversation commence à m'agacer. »
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias laisse échapper un sifflement agacé, tout en ouvrant et en refermant ses poings griffus.{/n} « Je ne sais pas exactement ce qui vous a poussé à imaginer que vous aviez voix au chapitre, mais votre insolence est fort amusante. Ses paroles, en revanche, ne le sont pas. Cette conversation commence à m'agacer. »

languages.text: {n}Tervantias sisea, molesto, y aprieta y afloja sus garras repetidamente.{/n} «No sé qué te ha inducido a creer que tienes derecho a levantar la voz, pero tu insolencia es entretenida. Sin embargo, sus palabras no lo son. La conversación se vuelve tediosa».
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias sisea, molesto, y aprieta y afloja sus garras repetidamente.{/n} «No sé qué te ha inducido a creer que tienes derecho a levantar la voz, pero tu insolencia es entretenida. Sin embargo, sus palabras no lo son. La conversación se vuelve tediosa».

languages.text: {n}Hoşnutsuzlukla tıslayan Tervantias, pençeli ellerini sıkıp gevşetiyor.{/n} "Sesini yükseltmeye hakkın olduğunu düşünmene sebep olan şeyi ne olduğunu bilmiyorum ama küstahlığın eğlendirici. Onun sözleri ise değil. Bu sohbet canımı sıkmaya başladı."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hoşnutsuzlukla tıslayan Tervantias, pençeli ellerini sıkıp gevşetiyor.{/n} "Sesini yükseltmeye hakkın olduğunu düşünmene sebep olan şeyi ne olduğunu bilmiyorum ama küstahlığın eğlendirici. Onun sözleri ise değil. Bu sohbet canımı sıkmaya başladı."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯不悦地嘶了一声，利爪般的双手时张时握。{/n}“真不知道你怎么会觉得自己有资格大声嚷嚷，但你展现出来的无礼很是有趣。不过，他说的话就没那么有意思了。这场对话真是越来越无聊了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯不悦地嘶了一声，利爪般的双手时张时握。{/n}“真不知道你怎么会觉得自己有资格大声嚷嚷，但你展现出来的无礼很是有趣。不过，他说的话就没那么有意思了。这场对话真是越来越无聊了。”

languages.text: {n}テルヴァンティアスは不快げにしゅうと音を立て、鉤爪の手を握っては開く。{/n}「何が貴様に、声を荒らげる資格があるなどと思い込ませたのか知らんが、その無礼さは愉快だ。だが、こいつの言葉はそうではない。この会話は退屈になってきたな」
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias hisses in displeasure, clenching and unclenching his clawed hands.{/n} "I am uncertain what gave you the impression that you are entitled to raise your voice, but your insolence is amusing. His words, however, are not. This conversation is becoming tedious."
